rankings.reason: Provides the most comprehensive and professional vision of a seamless, tech-integrated, and sustainable futuristic airport experience.
Offers a unique, creative focus on cultural immersion and destination preparation, distinguishing it from purely functional tech descriptions.
Includes engaging ideas like VR at gates, but the writing style is less professional and lacks structural polish.
Too abstract and vague; it lacks concrete technological details or a clear vision of the actual airport experience.
